## wikilinks() function

Creates a markdown-it plugin that renders escaped, ordinary HTML anchors.

The root entry performs no filesystem access and emits no framework-specific components. Filesystem tooltip discovery belongs to the `./node` adapter.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export default function wikilinks(options?: WikilinksOptions): (md: MarkdownIt) => void;
```
